introSection: Sky Scrapper (Chinese: 撕裂星空), also known as Starry Sky Ripper, is a Bolliger & Mabillard flying roller coaster located at World Joyland in Jiangsu, China. The ride opened on 30 April 2011 and features several unique and unusual elements.

sections.title: Significance
sections.content: Starry Sky Ripper is the first B&M flying coaster to feature a standard vertical loop and the first to feature a straight drop.

fullText:
Sky Scrapper (Chinese: 撕裂星空), also known as Starry Sky Ripper, is a Bolliger & Mabillard flying roller coaster located at World Joyland in Jiangsu, China. The ride opened on 30 April 2011 and features several unique and unusual elements.





Starry Sky Ripper is the first B&M flying coaster to feature a standard vertical loop and the first to feature a straight drop.
